heading: General application
label: 6731 General application
text: This subchapter shall only apply to a mutual insurance company in a State which has not enacted a law which expressly establishes reasonable terms and conditions for a mutual insurance company domiciled in such State to reorganize into a mutual holding company.
notes: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 106–102, title III, § 316113 Stat. 1422Nov. 12, 1999“This subtitle [subtitle B (§§ 311–316) of title III of , enacting this subchapter] shall take effect on the date of the enactment of this Act [].”Pub. L. 106–102Nov. 12, 1999
